title: AN ACT CREATING THE DEPARTMENT OF SOCIAL WELFARE IN THE CITY OF MANILA, FURTHER AMENDING FOR THIS PURPOSE, CERTAIN SECTIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED HUNDRED   NINE, AS AMENDED.

chunks.text:
H. No. 8885 / 61 OG No. 4, 367 (January 25, 1965)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4050, June 18, 1964 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE DEPARTMENT OF SOCIAL WELFARE IN THE CITY OF MANILA, FURTHER AMENDING FOR THIS PURPOSE, CERTAIN SECTIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED HUNDRED NINE, AS AMENDED.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representative of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Section twenty of Republic Act Numbered Four hundred nine, as amended, is further amended to read as follows:

"SEC. 20.

City Departments.

Ã¯Â¿Â½There shall be the following city departments over which the Mayor shall have direct supervision and control, except over the Office of the City Fiscal which shall be under the Department of Justice, any existing law to the contrary notwithstanding:

Department of Engineering and Public Works

Police Department

Office of the City Fiscal

Fire Department

Department of Finance

Department of Assessment

Department of Health

Department of Public Services

Department of Social Welfare

"The Board may from time to time make such readjustment in the duties of the several departments as the public interest may demand."

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 18, 1964.
